meta.description: Refund Policy for Neetrino.com services and purchases.

sections.title: Introduction
paragraphs: At Neetrino, we are committed to the highest level of customer satisfaction. We understand that sometimes our services may not meet your expectations. In such cases, we offer the following refund policy.

subsections.title: Refund Before Work Commences:
bullets: If the order is canceled before the commencement of work, we are ready to refund the full cost of the service.

subsections.title: Partial Refund:
bullets: If work has already started but is not completed, the client is entitled to a partial refund. The refund amount will be calculated based on the volume of work completed.

subsections.title: Refund After Completion of Work:
bullets: Refunds after the completion of work are not provided, except in cases where the service does not meet the described quality standards.

subsections.title: Exceptions:
bullets: Refunds do not apply to additional services that have already been purchased and activated, such as SEO packages, advanced payment gateways, etc.

subsections.title: Refund Request:
bullets: A refund request must be sent via email to info@neetrino.com within 30 days from the date of purchase.

subsections.title: Condition Verification:
bullets: Our team will conduct a review to determine if the refund request meets the established conditions.

subsections.title: Refund Processing:
bullets: In case of approval, the refund will be processed within 7 working days from the date of approval.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.text: For any questions related to the refund policy, please contact us via email at info@neetrino.com or by phone at +374 343 000.

closing: At Neetrino, we value each of our clients and are committed to providing high-quality services. Our goal is your success and satisfaction.
